title: CVRDE Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Combat Vehicles Research and Development Establishment (CVRDE) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 16 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Electrical, Electronics, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering can apply for the CVRDE Notification 2026 . The interested applicants ca...
